label: Accessibility-oriented planning
disclaimer: Planning screen only; not ADA, BCA, HDB, medical, OT, or contractor certification.

checks.message: Door/opening width is below the selected accessibility target.
Room envelope may not fit the selected turning circle.
Continuous circulation path is below target.

questions: Which mobility profile should drive checks?
Which route is the daily no-fail route?
Are thresholds, slopes, and door swings measured on site?
